name: Breast Screening Mammography
description: Screening mammography report template for breast cancer screening in asymptomatic patients

findings.technique: Digital screening mammography was performed with standard craniocaudal and mediolateral oblique views of bilateral breasts.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.
findings.limitations: None. The patient has no prior mammograms available for comparison.

sections.name: Breast Composition
sections.content: The breast composition is classified as [fatty / scattered density / heterogeneously dense / extremely dense] (ACR Density Category [a/b/c/d]).

sections.name: Right Breast
sections.content: The right breast demonstrates [no masses / no calcifications / no architectural distortion / no asymmetries]. No suspicious findings.

sections.name: Left Breast
sections.content: The left breast demonstrates [no masses / no calcifications / no architectural distortion / no asymmetries]. No suspicious findings.

sections.name: Axillae
sections.content: The bilateral axillae demonstrate [no enlarged lymph nodes / no suspicious lymphadenopathy]. No axillary masses.

sections.name: Skin and Nipple
sections.content: The skin and nipple are [unremarkable / no skin thickening / no nipple retraction]. No abnormal findings.

impression: BI-RADS Category 1: Negative. No suspicious findings identified on screening mammogram.
author: RadReport Templates
